# Headent Client 1.0.1

Maintenance release with audio-sync fixes, stability improvements and Android 16 support.
Available on **[Google Play](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=sk.tvhclient)**.

## What's fixed

- **Audio sync (HTSP)** — audio no longer lags behind the video on live streams.
  The player now lets libVLC align A/V itself instead of forcing frame timing,
  so sound stays in sync on phones, TV boxes and Android TV.
- **Crash on restart** — fixed an out-of-memory crash in the HTSP parser that
  could occur when the app was closed and reopened quickly, or reopened while
  still loading. The parser now rejects malformed/partial data instead of
  allocating huge buffers, and the connection is closed cleanly on exit.
- **Empty EPG after interrupted load** — only complete metadata is cached now,
  so closing the app mid-load no longer leaves the guide blank on next start.
- **TV home scrolling** — when the top buttons (Watch / TV guide) are focused,
  the list stays at the top so the date and time header remains visible.

## Improvements

- **Adjustable network buffer** — new Small / Medium / Large setting for smoother
  playback on Wi-Fi and mobile data.
- **Faster startup & better caching** — the app reuses loaded data instead of
  re-fetching it on every open.
- **Android 16 (API 36)** — updated to meet Google Play's target API requirement.
- Removed unused code (manual audio-delay / desync options) and cleaned up the player.
- Improved translations across all 31 languages.

## Notes

- Requires a running [Tvheadend](https://tvheadend.org/) server (4.2+ recommended).
- The attached APK is a universal build for sideloading (phones, TV boxes,
  Android TV). On Google Play the app is delivered as optimized per-device splits.
- Website & changelog: <https://headentclient.com>

## Checksums

Attached below (`*.apk`). Verify with `sha256sum`.
